text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At last, it's time for our first concert.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...Right. Then let's go with what we<n>did last
rehearsal. No need for smoke<n>in the finale. Mhm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Light Hello is giving out some<n>last-minute
directions to the stage<n>crew.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Deep breaths... deep breaths...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Just need to get my song out to<n>everyone. I
did everything I could to<n>prepare for today!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Like, yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We'll be having a concert soon!<n>Please stop by
and listen!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Good morning, Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Morning, Bourbon! You have tocome to our concert, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I have to? Is that an order, then?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yep! A super special order from<n>Falco! See you
there!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Order received.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I put a lot of effort into spreading the<n>word, right up
until the last minute!<n>This time...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want to make sure that the songs<n>everyone
worked so hard to<n>prepare...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Reach the hearts of as many people<n>as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice Smart Falcon's lips trembling<n>ever so
slightly.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I can do it! I'll get<n>everyone hyped
up so they want to<n>pitch in to our project.
choice_data_list: Don't put it all on yourself.
Don't put it all on yourself.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When they go out on stage, they<n>won't be alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They'll have us waiting in the wings,<n>and the
audience in front of them.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You're right. We're here to askeveryone for help.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll rope everyone in on the fun!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right, off I go!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... First, I will observe what<n>exactly you all
have cooked up with<n>this concert.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Suzuka? Suuuzuuukaaa?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...I'm right here. You don't have to<n>shout.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And you don't have to be so cold all<n>the time. At
any rate, do be sure to<n>pay close attention to
what's about to<n>unfold.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Even the weakest of electrical signals<n>can
stimulate the brain. The question<n>is whether or not
that stimulation will<n>lead to the desired reaction.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And whether or not we'll find the<n>piece we need.
It all begins with<n>observation.
